title: Verify Udyam Registration Number
shortDescription: Check the authenticity of any Udyam/MSME Certificate online using the 19-digit URN.
metaDescription: Official portal to verify Udyam Registration status. Enter your MSME number and captcha to check enterprise details and validity.
content:
Udyam Registration verification ek zaroori process hai taaki aap kisi bhi business ki MSME validity check kar sakein. Banks aur Govt departments aksar tender ya loan ke waqt iska verification maangte hain.

### Verify Kaise Karein?
1. Official Udyam Verification link par click karein.
2. Apna 19-digit Udyam Registration Number (URN) enter karein (e.g., UDYAM-XX-00-0000000).
3. Screen par diya gaya Captcha code bharein.
4. 'Verify' button par click karein.
5. Enterprise ka naam, classification (Micro/Small/Medium) aur status screen par dikh jayega.

### Verification Ke Fayde
- Fake MSME certificates ki pehchaan hoti hai.
- Government tenders mein eligibility confirm hoti hai.
- Business ki legal credibility badhti hai.

faqs.question: Kya verification ke liye OTP chahiye?
faqs.answer: Nahi, sirf Udyam Number aur Captcha se verification ho jata hai.

faqs.question: Invalid Udyam Number dikhaye toh kya karein?
faqs.answer: Check karein ki format sahi hai ya nahi, ya phir enterprise ne registration cancel toh nahi kar diya.

title: Print/Download Udyam Certificate
shortDescription: Download your official MSME Udyam Registration Certificate in PDF format using OTP login.
metaDescription: Download your Udyam Certificate online. Complete guide to get MSME certificate PDF copy using registered mobile and Udyam ID.
content:
Udyam Certificate download karna ab bahut aasaan hai. Ye certificate permanent hota hai aur iski koi expiry nahi hoti.

### Certificate Download Karne ka Process
1. 'Print Udyam Certificate' wale page par jayein.
2. Apna Udyam Registration Number (URN) enter karein.
3. Registered mobile number ya email id enter karein.
4. OTP option select karein (Mobile ya Email).
5. OTP verify karne ke baad 'Print Certificate' option par click karke PDF save kar lein.

### Certificate Features
Isme ek dynamic QR code hota hai jise scan karke koi bhi aapki details verify kar sakta hai.

faqs.question: Udyam certificate ki validity kitni hai?
faqs.answer: Ye lifetime valid hai jab tak aapka business active hai.

title: Update Udyam Details (Edit Profile)
shortDescription: Modify your existing Udyam registration info like Bank Account, Address, or NIC Codes.
metaDescription: Official login to update MSME Udyam details. Edit your business address, investment, or banking info online with OTP authentication.
content:
Agar aapne apna business address badla hai ya bank account change kiya hai, toh Udyam portal par update karna mandatory hai.

### Details Update Kaise Karein?
1. Udyam Login page par jayein.
2. Udyam Number aur Mobile se OTP login karein.
3. 'Edit' button par click karke details badlein.
4. Update submit karein. Naya certificate turant generate ho jayega.

### Important Update Info
Investment aur Turnover ki details Income Tax aur GST portal se apne aap update hoti hain.

faqs.question: Update karne ke baad naya certificate milega?
faqs.answer: Haan, update ke baad aapko naya updated version download karna hoga.

title: Forgot Udyam Registration Number
shortDescription: Find your lost or forgotten Udyam Registration Number (URN) using mobile or email.
metaDescription: Lost your MSME number? Use the official recovery tool to find your Udyam ID using registered mobile/email and OTP.
content:
Agar aap apna 19-digit Udyam number bhool gaye hain, toh ise wapas pana bahut easy hai.

### Step to Recover:
1. 'Forgot Udyam Number' link par click karein.
2. OTP option select karein (Mobile/Email).
3. Registered details bharein.
4. OTP verify karte hi aapka URN screen par aa jayega.

faqs.question: Agar mobile number kho gaya ho toh?
faqs.answer: Aapko apne area ke MSME-DI office mein application deni hogi recovery ke liye.

title: Search Taxpayer by GSTIN
shortDescription: Verify any business GSTIN number to check registration status and filing history.
metaDescription: Check GSTIN status online. Verify business name, legal address, and GST filing frequency of any taxpayer.
content:
Invoice lene se pehle GSTIN verify karna bahut zaroori hai. Isse pata chalta hai ki business active hai ya nahi.

### Kaise Check Karein?
1. GST portal ke 'Search Taxpayer' section mein jayein.
2. 15-digit GSTIN number enter karein.
3. Captcha code bharein aur Search karein.
4. Aapko taxpayer ka status (Active/Inactive), Jurisdiction, aur Return Filing history dikhegi.

faqs.question: GST status 'Cancelled' dikhaye toh kya karein?
faqs.answer: Iska matlab wo business valid GST invoice issue nahi kar sakta.

title: Search GST Taxpayer by PAN
shortDescription: Find all GSTIN numbers registered under a single PAN number across India.
metaDescription: Search all GST registrations linked to a PAN. Official tool to track multiple GSTINs under one business entity.
content:
Kayi businesses ke paas alag-alag states mein multiple GST registrations hote hain. Ye tool un sabhi ko ek jagah dikhata hai.

### Process:
1. Search by PAN link par click karein.
2. Apna ya kisi company ka PAN number enter karein.
3. Captcha enter karke Search karein.
4. Saare linked GSTIN numbers unke state ke saath list ho jayenge.

faqs.question: Kya ek PAN par 10 GST le sakte hain?
faqs.answer: Haan, agar aapka business 10 alag states mein hai toh aap 10 GSTIN le sakte hain.

title: Track GST Registration Status (ARN)
shortDescription: Check the real-time status of your new GST registration application using ARN.
metaDescription: Track your GST application status. Use Application Reference Number (ARN) to see if your GSTIN is approved or pending.
content:
Naye GST registration ke liye apply karne ke baad aapko ek ARN milta hai. Uska status yahan check karein.

### Status Types:
- **Pending for Processing:** Tax officer abhi check kar raha hai.
- **Pending for Clarification:** Aapko kuch aur documents dene honge.
- **Approved:** Aapka GSTIN generate ho gaya hai.

faqs.question: ARN status kitne din mein change hota hai?
faqs.answer: Usually 3-7 working days mein status update ho jata hai.

title: GST HSN/SAC Code Finder
shortDescription: Search for the correct HSN code for goods or SAC code for services for GST billing.
metaDescription: Official GST HSN/SAC code search tool. Find tax rates and correct codes for your products and services.
content:
Sahi GST rate lagane ke liye sahi HSN (Goods) ya SAC (Services) code hona zaroori hai.

### Kaise Dhundhen?
1. HSN Finder link par jayein.
2. Product ka naam ya uske shuruati 2-digit enter karein.
3. System description aur code ki list dikha dega.
4. Is code ko apne invoice aur returns mein use karein.

faqs.question: Bina HSN code ke bill bana sakte hain?
faqs.answer: Bade turnover wale businesses ke liye 4 ya 6 digit HSN code mandatory hai.

title: Track GST Refund Status
shortDescription: Monitor the status of your GST refund application (RFD-01) online.
metaDescription: Check your GST refund status. Track if your refund is sanctioned, pending, or rejected by the GST department.
content:
Agar aapne extra tax pay kiya hai ya export business mein hain, toh aap refund claim kar sakte hain.

### Check Status:
1. Login karke ya direct link par click karein.
2. Financial year aur ARN enter karein.
3. Refund ka stage check karein (e.g., Sanction Order issued).

faqs.question: Refund aane mein kitna samay lagta hai?
faqs.answer: Legal limit 60 days ki hai, lekin aksar jaldi process ho jata hai.

title: GST Payment/Challan Status
shortDescription: Check if your GST tax payment was successful and credited to your ledger.
metaDescription: Track GST challan payment status. Verify if your tax payment is updated in the Electronic Cash Ledger.
content:
Kayi baar bank se paisa kat jata hai par portal par update nahi hota. Is tool se payment confirm karein.

### Steps:
1. CPIN (Common Portal Identification Number) enter karein.
2. GSTIN enter karein.
3. Payment status dekhein (Paid/Not Paid).

faqs.question: Paisa kat gaya par status 'Not Paid' hai?
faqs.answer: 24 ghante wait karein ya bank se reconciliation status check karein.

title: Udyam Assist Registration (IMEs)
shortDescription: Registration for Informal Micro Enterprises (IMEs) to get priority sector lending benefits.
metaDescription: Udyam Assist portal for small businesses without GST. Get informal micro enterprise certificate for bank benefits.
content:
Ye portal un micro businesses ke liye hai jo GST mein registered nahi hain par MSME benefits chahte hain.

### Benefits:
- Banks se aasaan loan (Priority Sector Lending).
- Government schemes mein participation.

faqs.question: Kya IMEs ke liye GST zaroori hai?
faqs.answer: Nahi, ye portal bina GST wale businesses ke liye hi bana hai.

title: Search GST Practitioner
shortDescription: Find authorized GST Practitioners in your area for tax filing help.
metaDescription: Official tool to find verified GST practitioners. Search by state, district, or pin code for tax assistance.
content:
Agar aapko GST filing mein madad chahiye, toh aap official GST practitioners ki list yahan dekh sakte hain.

### Kaise Search Karein?
1. State aur District select karein.
2. Practitioners ki list unke contact details ke saath aa jayegi.

faqs.question: GST practitioner ki fees kya hoti hai?
faqs.answer: Ye private professionals hote hain, inki fees unke experience aur kaam par depend karti hai.

title: Verify GST Challan (CPIN)
shortDescription: Verify your GST tax challan details using the CPIN number before payment.
metaDescription: Verify your GST payment challan details. Enter CPIN and GSTIN to check the tax amount and heads.
content:
Payment karne se pehle challan verify karna ek achhi aadat hai taaki galat head mein tax jama na ho jaye.

### Verification Step:
1. 14-digit CPIN enter karein.
2. Details check karein ki CGST/SGST amounts sahi hain ya nahi.

faqs.question: CPIN kitne din tak valid rehta hai?
faqs.answer: Generate hone ke 15 dino tak CPIN valid rehta hai.

title: Check GST Return Filing Status
shortDescription: Check whether a business files GST returns monthly or quarterly.
metaDescription: Find out the return filing frequency of a GST taxpayer. Check if they are under QRMP scheme or Monthly filing.
content:
Business partners ke liye ye janna zaroori hota hai ki unka vendor returns kab file karta hai taaki Input Tax Credit (ITC) mil sake.

### How to Check:
1. GSTIN number enter karein.
2. Current financial year ke liye unka filing type (Monthly/Quarterly) dekhein.

faqs.question: QRMP scheme kya hai?
faqs.answer: Quarterly Return Monthly Payment scheme, chote taxpayers ke liye.

title: GST Portal Login
shortDescription: Official login page for taxpayers to file returns, pay tax, and manage GST profile.
metaDescription: Access your GST dashboard. Secure login for filing GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, and checking Electronic Credit Ledger.
content:
Sari main services (Return filing, Refund apply, Profile update) ke liye aapko yahan se login karna hota hai.

### Login Requirements:
- Username aur Password.
- First-time login ke liye TRN ya Provisional ID.

faqs.question: Password bhool gaye toh kya karein?
faqs.answer: 'Forgot Password' link ka use karke email/mobile OTP se reset karein.

title: CDSCO SUGAM Portal Login
shortDescription: Official login for drug manufacturers and importers to apply for licenses and permissions.
metaDescription: Login to SUGAM portal for CDSCO online services. Official link for drug, medical device, and cosmetic licensing in India.
content:
SUGAM portal CDSCO ka ek digital platform hai jo pharmaceutical companies aur importers ko regulatory approvals lene mein madad karta hai. 

### Sugam Portal Par Kya Hota Hai?
- **Drug License Application:** Nayi dawaiyon (New Drugs) ki approval ke liye.
- **Import License:** Videsh se dawai mangwane ke liye registration.
- **Cosmetic Registration:** Beauty products ke import aur manufacturing ke liye registration.

### Login Kaise Karein?
1. Link par click karke portal open karein.
2. Registered User ID aur Password daalein.
3. Captcha bhar kar dashboard access karein.

faqs.question: Naya account kaise banayein?
faqs.answer: Portal par 'Sign Up' button par click karke apne business details aur ID proof upload karein.

title: Check Drug License Application Status
shortDescription: Track the status of your drug manufacturing or import license application online.
metaDescription: Track CDSCO application status. Enter your application number to check the progress of your drug or cosmetic license.
content:
CDSCO mein file ki gayi kisi bhi application ka status check karna ab aasaan hai. Isse aapko pata chalta hai ki file kis officer ke paas pending hai.

### Tracking Process:
1. SUGAM portal ke tracking page par jayein.
2. Apna 'File Number' ya 'Application Number' enter karein.
3. Screen par real-time status dikhayega (e.g., Query Raised, Approved, Rejected).

faqs.question: Query aane par kya karein?
faqs.answer: Sugam portal mein login karke 'Query Reply' section mein maangi gayi jankari upload karein.

title: Apply for New Driving License (DL)
shortDescription: Official link to apply for a permanent Driving License after completing the Learner's License period.
metaDescription: Apply for a permanent Driving License (DL) online. Complete guide for slot booking, fee payment, and document upload on Sarathi portal.
content:
Learner's License (LL) milne ke 1 mahine baad aur 6 mahine se pehle aap Permanent DL ke liye apply kar sakte hain.

### DL Apply Karne ka Tarika:
1. Sarathi Parivahan portal par 'Apply for New DL' chunein.
2. Apna Learner's License number aur Date of Birth daalein.
3. Form check karein aur 'Vehicle Class' select karein.
4. Required documents upload karein aur Fees pay karein.
5. RTO test ke liye 'Slot Booking' karein.

### Test Ke Liye Zaroori:
Test ke waqt aapke paas asli documents aur wahi gaadi honi chahiye jiske liye aapne apply kiya hai.

faqs.question: DL kitne din mein banta hai?
faqs.answer: Test pass karne ke baad 15-30 working days mein DL aapke address par post se aa jata hai.

title: Driving License Renewal Online
shortDescription: Renew your expired or about-to-expire Driving License through Sarathi Parivahan.
metaDescription: Online DL renewal guide. Steps to renew your driving license, fee details, and required documents like Form 1-A.
content:
Driving license ki validity khatam hone se 1 saal pehle ya khatam hone ke baad aap renewal ke liye apply kar sakte hain.

### Renewal Process:
1. Sarathi portal par 'Services on DL' chunein.
2. DL Number aur DOB enter karein.
3. 'Renewal of DL' option select karein.
4. Agar umar 40+ hai, toh Doctor se 'Form 1-A' (Medical Certificate) sign karwake upload karein.
5. Fees pay karein aur application submit karein.

faqs.question: Grace period kitna hota hai?
faqs.answer: DL expire hone ke 1 saal baad tak aap bina dobara test diye renew kara sakte hain, lekin penalty lagti hai.

title: Check Vehicle Challan Status
shortDescription: Check and pay your traffic police challans (e-challan) online for any vehicle.
metaDescription: Check e-challan status by vehicle number or DL. Pay your traffic fines online on the official e-challan Parivahan portal.
content:
Traffic rules todne par camera ya police dwara kata gaya challan aap online check kar sakte hain.

### Challan Kaise Dekhen?
1. E-challan portal par jayein.
2. 'Vehicle Number' ya 'Challan Number' ya 'DL Number' enter karein.
3. Gaadi ka Chassis ya Engine number ke aakhri 5 digit daalein.
4. 'Get Detail' par click karein. Agar koi challan hoga toh list dikh jayegi.

### Online Payment:
Aap debit card, credit card ya UPI se turant fine bhar sakte hain.

faqs.question: Challan na bharne par kya hoga?
faqs.answer: Challan pending hone par aapka RC ya DL block ho sakta hai aur mamla court ja sakta hai.

title: EPF Member Passbook Login
shortDescription: Login to view your EPF balance, interest, and download your PF passbook.
metaDescription: Check PF balance online. Official EPFO member passbook login to view monthly contributions and interest credits.
content:
EPF Member Passbook portal se aap apne Provident Fund (PF) ka balance aur status check kar sakte hain.

### Balance Kaise Dekhen?
1. Link par click karein.
2. Apna 12-digit UAN (Universal Account Number) enter karein.
3. Password aur Captcha daalkar login karein.
4. Apni Member ID select karein aur 'View Passbook' par click karein.

### Passbook Details:
Isme employee aur employer dono ka contribution alag-alag dikhta hai.

faqs.question: Login nahi ho raha toh kya karein?
faqs.answer: Check karein ki aapka UAN active hai ya nahi. Naya UAN activate karne ke 6 ghante baad passbook dikhti hai.

title: UAN Activation Online
shortDescription: Activate your Universal Account Number (UAN) to access EPF services online.
metaDescription: Step-by-step guide to activate UAN. Essential for checking PF balance, updating KYC, and online PF withdrawal.
content:
Jab tak aapka UAN active nahi hoga, aap online PF ka koi bhi kaam nahi kar payenge.

### Activation Process:
1. Portal par 'Activate UAN' link par jayein.
2. UAN, Aadhaar, Name, DOB aur Mobile number enter karein (Jo Aadhaar se link ho).
3. 'Get Authorization Pin' par click karein.
4. Mobile par aaye OTP ko bhar kar 'Activate UAN' karein.

### Password:
Activation ke baad aapke mobile par ek temporary password aayega, jise aap baad mein badal sakte hain.

faqs.question: Details match nahi ho rahi, kya karein?
faqs.answer: Agar Aadhaar aur EPFO records mein naam ya DOB alag hai, toh pehle use apne employer se theek karwayein.

title: Track PF Claim Status
shortDescription: Check the status of your PF withdrawal, transfer, or pension claim online.
metaDescription: Track your PF claim status. Find out if your PF withdrawal application is under process, settled, or rejected by EPFO.
content:
Agar aapne PF nikalne ya transfer karne ke liye online apply kiya hai, toh aap uska current status track kar sakte hain.

### Kaise Track Karein?
1. Unified Member Portal par login karein.
2. Menu mein 'Online Services' par jayein.
3. 'Track Claim Status' par click karein.
4. Settlement ki date aur status wahan dikh jayega.

faqs.question: Status 'Under Process' kitne din rehta hai?
faqs.answer: Usually 7 se 15 dino mein claim settle ho jata hai.

title: Search HSN Code (Goods & Services)
shortDescription: Find the correct HSN/SAC code and tax rates for your products and services.
metaDescription: Search HSN and SAC codes online. Official GST portal tool to find 4, 6, or 8 digit codes for accurate billing.
content:
GST invoices ke liye sahi HSN code hona mandatory hai. Ye tool aapko wahi code dhundhne mein madad karta hai.

### Steps:
1. Search bar mein product ka naam likhen (e.g., 'Sugar' ya 'Mobile').
2. System usse jude sabhi HSN codes aur unke tax brackets dikha dega.

faqs.question: SAC code kya hai?
faqs.answer: Services ke liye use hone wale code ko SAC (Services Accounting Code) kehte hain.

title: Verify PAN Card Status (Instant)
shortDescription: Verify if a PAN card is active and check the name as per Income Tax records.
metaDescription: Verify PAN online. Check PAN status and owner name on the official Income Tax portal to avoid fraudulent transactions.
content:
Business transactions se pehle PAN card verify karna ek safe practice hai.

### Kaise Verify Karein?
1. PAN Number, Full Name, DOB aur Mobile enter karein.
2. Mobile par aaye OTP ko bharein.
3. System batayega 'PAN is Active' aur details match ho rahi hain ya nahi.

faqs.question: Kya dusre ka PAN verify kar sakte hain?
faqs.answer: Haan, lekin aapke paas unka wahi mobile hona chahiye jo PAN se link hai OTP ke liye.

title: Check Aadhaar-PAN Linking Status
shortDescription: Check if your Aadhaar is successfully linked with your PAN card online.
metaDescription: Aadhaar PAN link status check. Official link to verify if your PAN is operative or inoperative due to Aadhaar linking.
content:
India mein PAN card ko Aadhaar se link karna mandatory hai. Agar link nahi hai, toh PAN 'Inoperative' ho sakta hai.

### Kaise Check Karein?
1. Link par click karein.
2. PAN Number aur Aadhaar Number enter karein.
3. 'View Link Aadhaar Status' par click karein.
4. Agar link hai, toh message aayega 'Already Linked'.

faqs.question: Link nahi hai toh kya karein?
faqs.answer: Income Tax portal par 1000 rupaye ki penalty bhar kar 'Link Aadhaar' option se link karein.

title: Apply for New Voter ID Card
shortDescription: Register as a new voter and apply for a Voter ID card (Voter Service Portal).
metaDescription: Apply for new Voter ID (Form 6). Official NVSP/ECI portal for voter registration and identity card application.
content:
Agar aapki umar 18 saal ho gayi hai, toh aap naye Voter ID ke liye 'Form 6' online bhar sakte hain.

### Requirements:
- Photo
- Age Proof (Birth Certificate/Aadhaar)
- Address Proof (Aadhaar/Electricity Bill)

### Steps:
1. NVSP portal par sign up karein.
2. 'Form 6' select karein aur details bharein.
3. Documents upload karke submit karein.

faqs.question: Voter card kitne din mein banta hai?
faqs.answer: BLO verification ke baad usually 1-2 mahine mein card ghar aa jata hai.

title: Download E-Voter ID (e-EPIC)
shortDescription: Download your digital Voter ID card (e-EPIC) in PDF format online.
metaDescription: Download e-EPIC online. Get your digital Voter ID card PDF using EPIC number or Form Reference Number.
content:
e-EPIC ek secure PDF version hai Voter ID card ka, jise aap mobile ya computer par download karke kahin bhi dikha sakte hain.

### Kaise Download Karein?
1. Portal par login karein.
2. Apna EPIC Number (Voter ID number) daalein.
3. Registered mobile par aaye OTP ko verify karein.
4. PDF download karein.

faqs.question: Kya e-EPIC asli card jitna valid hai?
faqs.answer: Haan, ye poori tarah se valid document hai.

title: Search Name in Voter List
shortDescription: Check if your name is present in the latest electoral roll/voter list.
metaDescription: Voter list name search. Find your polling station and serial number in the voter list using EPIC number or name details.
content:
Vote dene jane se pehle apna naam voter list mein check karna zaroori hai.

### Kaise Dhundhen?
1. 'Search by EPIC' (Voter ID se) ya 'Search by Details' (Naam, Father's Name se) chunein.
2. Details bhar kar search karein.
3. Aapko apna Polling Booth, Serial Number aur Part Number dikh jayega.

faqs.question: Agar naam list mein nahi hai toh kya karein?
faqs.answer: Aapko dobara 'Form 6' bhar kar registration karwana hoga.

title: Apply for New PAN Card (UTIITSL)
shortDescription: Apply for a fresh PAN card through the official UTIITSL portal.
metaDescription: Apply for new PAN card online. Official UTIITSL portal for Indian citizens to get a Permanent Account Number (Form 49A).
content:
Income Tax department ne PAN card ke liye do authorized agents banaye hain, UTIITSL unme se ek hai.

### Application Steps:
1. 'Form 49A' select karein.
2. Digital ya Physical mode chunein (Digital mode mein Aadhaar OTP chahiye).
3. Fees (approx 107/-) pay karein.
4. Document submit hone ke baad 10-15 din mein PAN ghar aa jata hai.

faqs.question: Physical mode mein kya karna hota hai?
faqs.answer: Isme aapko form print karke documents ke saath UTI office bhejna hota hai.
